revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=FULLROOTPAGENAME%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=FULLROOTPAGENAME%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- Please add categories at the bottom of this page, and interwikis at Wikidata (see Wikipedia:Wikidata) -->
{{used in system}}

Get the namespace and the root of the page name. It is similar to the template {{tl|FULLBASEPAGENAME}}, but returns the '''root''' of the page hierarchy instead of the '''parent'''. 

=== Usage ===
* {{tlx|FULLROOTPAGENAME}} → {{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}
* {{tlx|FULLROOTPAGENAME|Template:1x/sandbox}} → {{FULLROOTPAGENAME|Template:1x/sandbox}}
* {{tlx|FULLROOTPAGENAME|Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Arbitration enforcement/Archive1}} → {{FULLROOTPAGENAME|Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Arbitration enforcement/Archive1}}

In namespaces with subpages disabled, it will return the full page name:
* {{tlx|FULLROOTPAGENAME|List of 28 Days/Weeks Later characters}} → {{FULLROOTPAGENAME|List of 28 Days/Weeks Later characters}}

Note that this template can be substituted.

== TemplateData ==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>{
  "description": "A meta template that takes a page name and returns its root page name (including namespace).",
  "params": {
    "1": {
      "label": "Page name",
      "description": "The input page name. If omitted or empty, the current page name will be used",
      "type": "string/wiki-page-name",
      "required": false
    }
  }
}</templatedata>

== See also ==
* [[mw:Help:Magic words#Page names]]
* {{tl|FULLBASEPAGENAME}}
* {{tl|ROOTPAGENAME}}

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||
<!-- Add categories below this line, and interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=FULLROOTPAGENAME%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}

{{used in system}}

Get the namespace and the root of the page name. It is similar to the template {{tl|FULLBASEPAGENAME}}, but returns the '''root''' of the page hierarchy instead of the '''parent'''. 

=== Usage ===
* {{tlx|FULLROOTPAGENAME}} → {{FULLROOTPAGENAME}}
* {{tlx|FULLROOTPAGENAME|Template:1x/sandbox}} → {{FULLROOTPAGENAME|Template:1x/sandbox}}
* {{tlx|FULLROOTPAGENAME|Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Arbitration enforcement/Archive1}} → {{FULLROOTPAGENAME|Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Arbitration enforcement/Archive1}}

In namespaces with subpages disabled, it will return the full page name:
* {{tlx|FULLROOTPAGENAME|List of 28 Days/Weeks Later characters}} → {{FULLROOTPAGENAME|List of 28 Days/Weeks Later characters}}

Note that this template can be substituted.

== TemplateData ==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>{
  "description": "A meta template that takes a page name and returns its root page name (including namespace).",
  "params": {
    "1": {
      "label": "Page name",
      "description": "The input page name. If omitted or empty, the current page name will be used",
      "type": "string/wiki-page-name",
      "required": false
    }
  }
}</templatedata>

== See also ==
* [[mw:Help:Magic words#Page names]]
* {{tl|FULLBASEPAGENAME}}
* {{tl|ROOTPAGENAME}}

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||

}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
